fieldSchema.label: 鞋款
fieldSchema.helpText: 沿用当前 THERUIZ AURA 鞋款选择。

promptRules.product: THERUIZ AURA Cloud Dancer German trainer as the main product reference. Use uploaded sneaker reference as strict source: low-cut German trainer silhouette, rounded toe box, slim outsole, panels, tongue, stitching, material, color, and proportions. When worn, allow only subtle forefoot upper flex, gentle collar compression, settled laces, and grounded contact shadow; never let the foot, pose, or fabric reshape the toe box, panels, outsole, or silhouette. Keep at least one sneaker fully visible from toe to heel, with the second clearly readable and grounded. Keep laces naturally tied, with readable loops, lace ends, eyelets, and tongue.
accuracy: Preserve Cloud Dancer as a refined off-white low-cut German trainer with visible panel structure, natural off-white tone, slim outsole, rounded toe box, and no overexposed white upper.
visibility: Keep at least one sneaker fully visible from toe to heel, with the second clearly readable and grounded.
clipping: Keep the foot seated inside the shoe; ankle, sock, garment hem, collar, tongue, tied laces, outsole, floor, and props stay separate and readable; no clipping or fabric fusion.
scene: Keep at least one sneaker fully visible from toe to heel, with the second clearly readable and grounded. Keep the foot seated inside the shoe; ankle, sock, garment hem, collar, tongue, tied laces, outsole, floor, and props stay separate and readable; no clipping or fabric fusion. Keep laces naturally tied, with readable loops, lace ends, eyelets, and tongue. When worn, allow only subtle forefoot upper flex, gentle collar compression, settled laces, and grounded contact shadow; never let the foot, pose, or fabric reshape the toe box, panels, outsole, or silhouette.
imageType: Generate a refined on-foot lifestyle image with a safe standing pose or small natural walking step. The sneakers must be complete, clear, structurally accurate, and separate from trouser hems.
actionSafety: Foot placement must stay stable and readable: keep clear ground contact, realistic toe direction, correct left-right shoe relationship, natural ankle-to-shoe alignment, and no overlapping legs hiding the sneaker shape. Props must not cover the shoes, foot placement, laces, tongue, toe box, heel, or outsole.
Keep body scale, leg length, hand size, foot scale, and shoe-to-leg relationship realistic.
stylingBoundary: Classic clean light-tone foundation; coordinate it with cream, warm beige, soft denim blue, and refined daily neutrals.

fieldSchema.label: 品牌（可选）
fieldSchema.helpText: 不填写时不自动添加品牌。

fieldSchema.label: 鞋面材质 / 材质外观
鞋跟高度
fieldSchema.helpText: 未知时填写“按参考图保持”。

negativeRules: exposed toes in a closed-toe pump

promptRules.product: Use the uploaded pump references as the strict source. Preserve closed-toe pump named closed-toe pump, toe shape other, heel type other, heel height 按参考图保持, back construction closedBack, no strap.
accuracy: Keep the foot naturally seated inside the closed-toe pump, with heel aligned to the heel counter, realistic ankle alignment, grounded contact, and no foot or shoe intersection. Preserve the exact pump silhouette, toe geometry, vamp line, topline opening, side cut, heel counter, heel height, heel shape, heel thickness, heel placement, heel angle, arch curve, shoe pitch, outsole thickness, platform height, back or strap construction, material, color, and proportions shown in the uploaded references. At least one pump must remain fully visible from toe to heel; keep the second pump readable when the composition allows. Preserve the closed rear counter exactly as referenced.
visibility: Keep the closed-toe pump fully visible from toe to heel, with topline, vamp, side cut, heel, and grounded contact readable.
clipping: Keep ankle, hosiery, garment hem, pump topline, vamp, heel counter, floor, and props physically separate; no foot clipping or fabric fusion.
scene: Keep the pump as the same product in every frame; do not redesign the heel or toe between shots.
imageType: Closed-toe pump product identity: preserve toe geometry, vamp line, topline opening, side cut, heel geometry, arch curve, and outsole relationship.
actionSafety: Foot-to-pump contact: foot seated naturally inside the shoe, heel aligned with the counter, no exposed toes, no floating heel, no impossible ankle rotation, and believable left-right scale.
negative: exposed toes in a closed-toe pump
stylingBoundary: Pump-supporting styling: keep at least one shoe fully visible from toe to heel; use ankle-length trousers, cropped trousers, midi or knee-length skirts, refined dresses, or tailored suits without hems covering the heel.
quality: Pump quality check: toe, vamp, topline, side cut, arch, heel height, heel shape, heel placement, outsole, and material must remain reference-accurate.

negativeRules: product hidden by skirt or coat

promptRules.product: Use uploaded boot references as the strict source. Preserve boot named boot, subtype other, toe shape other, shaft height 按参考图保持, shaft structure other, closure other, heel type other, heel height 按参考图保持.
accuracy: Preserve the exact boot subtype, toe geometry, shaft height, shaft circumference, shaft opening, ankle ease, calf fit, knee relation, shaft stiffness, closure construction, heel geometry, outsole thickness, tread profile, material, color, finish, and overall proportions shown in the uploaded references.
visibility: Keep at least one complete boot visible from toe to shaft opening; for long boots do not crop away the shaft.
clipping: Keep foot, ankle, calf, knee, shaft opening, garment hem, boot, floor, and props physically separate; no leg or fabric clipping.
scene: Keep the exact same boot subtype and shaft height in every frame.
imageType: Boot identity: preserve subtype, toe, shaft, opening, ankle, calf, closure, heel, outsole, tread, material, and finish.
actionSafety: Keep the foot inside the boot with aligned ankle, centered calf, plausible knee relationship, natural shaft opening, realistic gravity, and clean ground contact; no leg or boot intersection.
negative: product hidden by skirt or coat
stylingBoundary: Boot styling: keep one complete boot visible; use subtype-appropriate cropped or straight trousers, tucked narrow trousers, midi or knee-length skirts, dresses, and coats without shaft clipping or permanent concealment.
quality: Boot quality check: subtype, toe, shaft height/opening, closure, heel, outsole, tread, and leg relationship remain reference-accurate.

promptRules.product: Use uploaded loafer references as the strict source. Preserve loafer, subtype other, toe shape other, other construction, apron/vamp, saddle or ornament none, topline, heel height 按参考图保持, outsole, welt, material, color, and proportions.
accuracy: Preserve the exact loafer silhouette, toe geometry, apron or vamp construction, saddle and ornament structure, topline opening, heel counter, heel height, outsole thickness, welt profile, material, color, finish, and proportions shown in the uploaded references.
visibility: Keep at least one loafer fully visible from toe to heel.
clipping: Keep foot, instep, vamp, topline, garment hem, loafer, and floor physically separate; no clipping or floating heel.
scene: Use refined smart-casual movement: standing, small step, side stance, or restrained seated pause; avoid running, jumping, deep squat, and exaggerated athletic flex.
imageType: Loafer identity: keep apron, saddle, ornament, topline, heel, welt, outsole, and material category-native.
actionSafety: Foot-to-loafer contact must be natural at the instep; no foot through vamp, floating heel, or duplicated feet.
stylingBoundary: Use cropped or straight trousers, midi skirts, dresses, suits, and intentional refined socks; keep apron and ornament visible.
quality: Loafer quality check: subtype, apron, ornament, topline, heel, welt, outsole, and foot contact remain reference-accurate.

negativeRules: exposed toes in a closed-toe flat

promptRules.product: Use uploaded ballet-flat references as the strict source. Preserve ballet flat, subtype other, toe shape other, vamp coverage 按参考图保持, topline 按参考图保持, binding, ornament none, strap none, heel lift 按参考图保持, thin outsole 按参考图保持, material, color, and proportions.
accuracy: Preserve the exact ballet-flat silhouette, toe geometry, shallow vamp coverage, topline opening, binding edge, side cut, heel counter, heel lift, outsole thinness, strap or ornament structure, material, color, finish, and proportions shown in the uploaded references.
visibility: Keep at least one ballet flat fully visible from toe to heel.
clipping: Keep foot, opening, binding, garment hem, flat, and floor physically separate; no toe clipping, opening cutting into the foot, or floating heel.
scene: Use natural everyday movement: standing, slight weight shift, small step, side stance, or restrained seated pause; avoid running, jumping, high kick, extreme toe pointing, and slipper-like collapse.
imageType: Ballet-flat identity: keep shallow vamp, topline, binding, side cut, bow or strap, heel lift, thin outsole, and material category-native.
actionSafety: Foot-to-flat contact must be natural; no foot sliding out, no opening cutting into the foot, no collapse, no floating heel, and no duplicated feet.
negative: exposed toes in a closed-toe flat
stylingBoundary: Use cropped or straight trousers, midi skirts, dresses, relaxed tailoring, and intentional hosiery; keep the opening, binding, and ornament visible.
quality: Ballet-flat quality check: subtype, toe, vamp, topline, binding, ornament, strap, heel lift, outsole, and foot contact remain reference-accurate.

promptRules.product: Use uploaded sandal references as the strict source. Preserve sandal, subtype other, toe type other, strap layout and count, ankle or heel strap, buckle, heel other 按参考图保持, outsole, material, color, and proportions.
accuracy: Preserve the exact sandal subtype, toe opening, strap count, strap width, strap placement and crossing order, ankle or heel strap construction, buckle and hardware geometry, footbed shape, heel geometry, outsole thickness, platform height, material, color, finish, and proportions shown in the uploaded references.
visibility: Keep at least one sandal fully readable from toe opening to heel.
clipping: Keep toes, footbed, straps, ankle, heel strap, garment hem, and floor physically separate; no strap cutting through skin or foot intersection.
scene: Use natural warm-weather movement: standing, slight weight shift, small step, side stance, or restrained seated pause; avoid running, jumping, long stride, and unnatural toe gripping.
imageType: Sandal identity: keep toe exposure, strap hierarchy, ankle or heel strap, footbed, heel, platform, and outsole category-native.
actionSafety: Toes must align naturally with the opening and remain seated on the footbed; no missing or duplicated toes, floating heel, or sliding foot.
stylingBoundary: Use cropped trousers, midi skirts, dresses, tailored shorts, light suits, or refined event styling; keep toes, straps, and heel visible.
quality: Sandal quality check: toe opening, strap layout, heel/ankle structure, footbed, outsole, and foot contact remain reference-accurate.

promptRules.product: Use uploaded mule references as the strict source. Preserve mule, subtype other, toe type other, vamp coverage 按参考图保持, throat and topline, backless edge, insertion depth, heel exposure, heel other 按参考图保持, outsole, material, color, and proportions.
accuracy: Preserve the exact mule silhouette, toe geometry or opening, vamp coverage, throat and topline shape, side cut, backless edge, foot-insertion depth, heel-exposure proportion, heel geometry, outsole thickness, platform height, material, color, finish, and proportions shown in the uploaded references.
visibility: Keep at least one mule fully visible from toe or opening to heel.
clipping: Keep foot, vamp, opening, backless edge, heel exposure, garment hem, mule, and floor physically separate; no sliding foot, floating heel, or intersection.
scene: Use relaxed movement: standing, slight weight shift, small step, side stance, or restrained seated pause; avoid running, jumping, long stride, and shoe rotation under the foot.
imageType: Mule identity: preserve backless structure, vamp coverage, opening, insertion depth, heel exposure, heel, platform, and outsole without turning it into a sandal or pump.
actionSafety: Insert the foot to the referenced depth; heel remains naturally exposed, not floating far above the sole, and the foot must not slide forward.
stylingBoundary: Use cropped or straight trousers, midi skirts, dresses, tailored shorts, relaxed tailoring, or refined evening styling; keep backless edge and heel exposure visible.
quality: Mule quality check: toe, vamp, backless edge, insertion depth, heel exposure, outsole, and foot contact remain reference-accurate.
